allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: complete Week 1 capture layer with database-enforced immutability

Three capture surfaces \(voice/text/photo\), Sonnet extraction pipeline,
offline PWA with IndexedDB queue, single-user auth, and append-only
audit log. Raw content immutability enforced by PostgreSQL trigger —
not application convention — blocking UPDATE on raw_content,
photo_caption_raw, and ocr_text \(once set\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: week-3 chat surface with shared capture pipeline *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: week-3 email intake and Google Calendar *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat: week-4 agents, dashboard, and decisions log *)
